items.title_en: Warsh experiences worst 'Fed day' S&P 500 performance for a new chair since 1994
items.title_zh: 沃什在“美联储日”经历了自 1994 年以来新任主席以来标普 500 指数表现最差的一次
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 tumbled more than 1% in Wednesday's session, with losses steepening during Warsh' innagural press conference as chair.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数在周三交易中下跌超过 1%，在沃什担任主席的首次新闻发布会上跌幅进一步扩大。

items.title_en: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席
items.desc_en: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
items.desc_zh: 冈拉克表示，沃什的立场降低了过度宽松货币政策的风险，这种政策可能会重新引发通胀并推高长期借贷成本。

items.title_en: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale

items.desc_en: Any delay, and continuation of acting DNI Bill Pulte in the role, is likely to endanger the reauthorization of a key U.S. intelligence authority.
items.desc_zh: 国家情报总监比尔·普尔特（Bill Pulte）的任何延迟和继续代理职务都可能危及美国重要情报机构的重新授权。

items.title_en: Serial killer who murdered eight women in Long Island town imprisoned for life
items.title_zh: 在长岛镇谋杀八名妇女的连环杀手被终身监禁
items.desc_en: In fiery exchange, judge sentenced him to three life sentences plus 25 years to life on four other charges, all running consecutively.
items.desc_zh: 在激烈的交锋中，法官判处他三项无期徒刑，外加其他四项罪名，判处 25 年无期徒刑，所有罪名都是连续执行的。

items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。
